name: generic-kafka-json-flex-template
description: Reusable config-driven pipeline: Confluent Kafka input -> parser registry -> JSON output Kafka topic

parameters.name: inputTopic
parameters.label: Input Kafka topic
parameters.helpText: Source topic to read raw messages from

parameters.name: outputTopic
parameters.label: Output Kafka topic
parameters.helpText: Target topic to publish normalized JSON

parameters.name: parserRegistryPath
parameters.label: Parser registry file path
parameters.helpText: Optional local path, classpath: path, or gs:// path to registry yaml/json. Defaults to classpath:parser-registry.default.yaml

parameters.name: defaultMessageFormat
parameters.label: Fallback message format
parameters.helpText: Optional fallback parser key (for example: json, csv, xml). Defaults to json if omitted

parameters.name: deadLetterTopic
parameters.label: Dead letter topic
parameters.helpText: Optional Kafka topic for parse failures
